---
name: Methodology suggestion
about: Suggest an improvement to a pipeline stage or comparison algorithm
labels: methodology
---

## Stage affected
Which stage (1–5) or which part of the pipeline?

## Current behavior
What does the stage do today?

## Proposed change
What should it do instead, and why?

## References
Link to relevant papers, replication standards, or precedents (e.g. ACM artifact evaluation criteria).
